ddls:
CREATE TABLE "characters" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who owns the character */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of the character */,
  "experience_points" INTEGER /* Experience points of the character */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of the character */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the character */,
  "magic" INTEGER /* Magic attribute score */,
  "cunning" INTEGER /* Cunning attribute score */,
  "courage" INTEGER /* Courage attribute score */,
  "wisdom" INTEGER /* Wisdom attribute score */,
  "temper" INTEGER /* Temper attribute score */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the character was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the character was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the character is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characters_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_progression" (
  "progression_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progression event */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "progress_date" TEXT /* Date of the progression event */,
  "level_at_progress" INTEGER /* Level of the character at the time of the event */,
  "experience_points_at_progress" INTEGER /* Experience points of the character at the time of the event */,
  "magic" INTEGER /* Magic attribute score at the time of the event */,
  "cunning" INTEGER /* Cunning attribute score at the time of the event */,
  "courage" INTEGER /* Courage attribute score at the time of the event */,
  "wisdom" INTEGER /* Wisdom attribute score at the time of the event */,
  "temper" INTEGER /* Temper attribute score at the time of the event */,
  "quest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quest associated with the progression event */,
  "battle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the battle associated with the progression event */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Description of the action that led to the progression event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progression_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_progression_battle_id FOREIGN KEY ("battle_id") REFERENCES battles ("battle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_progression_quest_id FOREIGN KEY ("quest_id") REFERENCES quests ("quest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_progression_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the player joined the game */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the player's last login */,
  "total_characters" INTEGER /* Total number of characters created by the player */,
  "total_play_time" INTEGER /* Total play time of the player in minutes */,
  "is_premium" INTEGER /* Indicates if the player has a premium account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_player_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character-player mapping */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who owns the character */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_player_mapping_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_player_mapping_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quests" (
  "quest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quest */,
  "quest_name" TEXT /* Name of the quest */,
  "quest_description" TEXT /* Description of the quest */,
  "reward_points" INTEGER /* Points rewarded upon completing the quest */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the quest was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the quest was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "battles" (
  "battle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each battle */,
  "battle_name" TEXT /* Name of the battle */,
  "battle_description" TEXT /* Description of the battle */,
  "reward_points" INTEGER /* Points rewarded upon winning the battle */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the battle was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the battle was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("battle_id")
)
